name: Missed work 2 weeks after injury in Cottonwood Heights, what pay?

mainEntity.name: Missed work 2 weeks after injury in Cottonwood Heights, what pay?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**66 2/3% of average weekly wage, up to Utah max (~$1,200/week in 2026).**[3]

Covers from day 4 if over 3 days lost; retroactive if longer.

- Calculate from prior 13 weeks.
- No caps on medical.
- Permanent separate.

Submit pay stubs. Dispute low calcs.
